system.description:
Prerequisites: Willpower 50

Focus Power: Very Hard (–30) Willpower Test

Subtype: Attack, Concentration

The psyker unleashes a storm of psychic energy that ravages the minds of all nearby foes. This devastating attack can leave entire squads of enemies writhing in agony or dead from psychic shock.

This power is a Psychic Storm that deals 1d10 Energy Damage, +2 for every point of Psy Rating, with a Penetration of 5.
